name: PhenoVCS
absorption_note: ARCHIVE_ONLY (rejected ABSORB): PhenoVCS is a 5-member Rust workspace, not a single crate. The only member matching the target name (pheno-vcs-core) is a stub (assert!(true)). The literal cp -r PhenoVCS/src PhenoVCS/tests target fails because those paths do not exist. Additionally, pheno already has phenotype-git-core / agileplus-git / agileplus-github / pheno-plugins-git covering VCS scope, and crates/phenotype-infrastructure (PhenoVCS member) collides on name with pheno/crates/phenotype-infrastructure. Both fallback conditions from the absorption runbook were met, so disposition is ARCHIVE_ONLY with target=phenotype-registry. Source repo archived on GitHub.
note: Audited 2026-07-17; ARCHIVE_ONLY disposition (was ABSORB in pre-audit queue). Absorbed not into pheno but into phenotype-registry: rejected absorption because (a) pheno already has phenotype-git-core / agileplus-git / agileplus-github / pheno-plugins-git, (b) PhenoVCS is a multi-crate workspace with no root src/, and (c) pheno-vcs-core is a stub. Boundary doc at docs/boundary/PhenoVCS.md captures the rejected absorption in detail. [ABSORBED 2026-07-17]
